name: nexql
description: Universal SQL database management for VS Code — supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MSSQL, Oracle with notebook, AI assistant, and schema designer

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --minify
scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && npm run esbuild-renderer && npm run copy-templates
scripts.esbuild: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap
scripts.esbuild-watch: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap --watch & npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap --watch
scripts.test: npm run compile && mocha --loader ./node_modules/ts-node/esm/transpile-only.mjs -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && TS_NODE_PROJECT=src/test/tsconfig.json node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ./src/test/setup.ts ./node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha --exit 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/integration/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:renderer: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/RendererComponents.test.ts'
scripts.test:all: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.coverage: npm run compile && nyc ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts --exit 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'

commands.title: Open SQL Assistant in Editor Tab

viewsWelcome.contents:
Welcome to NexQL!

No database engines are currently available. Install a Database Extension to get started:

[Browse Database Extensions](command:workbench.extensions.search?%22nexql%22)

Database Extensions provide support for specific database engines (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, etc.).

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server

port.description: Port number of the PostgreSQL server

environment.description: Environment tag for safety warnings and visual indicators

readOnlyMode.description: Force read-only transactions for this connection

nexql.aiProvider.description: AI Provider to use for query assistance

nexql.aiApiKey.description: API Key for direct AI providers (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/custom)

nexql.aiModel.description: Model name (e.g., gpt-4, claude-3-opus). Leave empty for defaults.

nexql.streaming.enabled.description: Enable cursor-based streaming for large result sets

nexql.streaming.batchSize.description: Number of rows per batch when streaming results

nexql.queryTimeout.description: Global query timeout in milliseconds (0 for no timeout). Can be overridden per connection.

nexql.performance.slowQueryThresholdMs.description: Threshold in milliseconds to flag slow queries in history and results.

nexql.performance.defaultLimit.description: Default row limit for SELECT queries when auto-LIMIT is enabled.

nexql.query.autoLimitEnabled.description: Automatically append LIMIT clause to SELECT queries that don't have one. Always enabled in read-only mode.

nexql.autoRefresh.enabled.description: Enable automatic background refresh of the explorer tree and notebooks panel.

nexql.autoRefresh.pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to poll PostgreSQL for schema changes.
